Operation 'readMeter' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks clarity on required parameters (meter identification), authentication requirements, and detailed response structure. Added specifics about supported devices, authentication, and response schema to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns real-time meter readings. Returns up to the latest 1,000 reads per meter. If your device is read once per minute, data is available once per minute.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the latest real-time meter readings from an EKM Omnimeter or ioStack device. Returns up to 1,000 most recent readings per meter. Data freshness depends on device read frequency (e.g., once per minute). Requires authentication with EKM Push API key. Returns a ReadMeterResponse containing meter identification and ReadSet data with 26 measurement fields including energy consumption, voltage, current, and power factor.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity on required parameters (meter identification), authentication requirements, and detailed response structure. Added specifics about supported devices, authentication, and response schema to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getAccount' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description mentions authentication options but lacks clarity on required input parameters and response structure. Added specifics about parameter requirements, authentication modes, and response content to help AI agents determine appropriate usage and understand what data will be returned.

data.current_description: Returns information for the specified target: account, gateway, meter, or ioStack. You may use the EKM Push Key (full account access) or a Gateway Key (restricted to that gateway).
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve account, gateway, meter, or device information
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specified target entity: account, Push3 gateway, meter, or ioStack device. Supports two authentication modes: EKM Push Key for full account access or Gateway Key for gateway-restricted access. Requires target type and identifier as parameters. Returns an AccountResponse containing account details, device listings, or gateway configuration depending on the target type.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions authentication options but lacks clarity on required input parameters and response structure. Added specifics about parameter requirements, authentication modes, and response content to help AI agents determine appropriate usage and understand what data will be returned.

message: Operation 'listTriggers' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is minimal and lacks context about trigger functionality and required parameters. Added explanation of what triggers do, required input (gateway ID), and response structure to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns all triggers configured on a Push3 gateway.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all triggers configured on a specified Push3 gateway. Triggers define automated actions (email notifications, webhook calls, or relay control) based on metered conditions. Requires gateway identification parameter. Returns an array of Trigger objects, each containing trigger ID, name, condition rules, and configured actions.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and lacks context about trigger functionality and required parameters. Added explanation of what triggers do, required input (gateway ID), and response structure to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'createTrigger' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description explains trigger capabilities but omits required input structure, response details, and side effects. Added specifics about TriggerRequest schema, HTTP status code, response content, and activation behavior for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Creates a new trigger on a Push3 gateway. Triggers can send emails, fire webhooks, or control relays based on metered conditions.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new trigger on a specified Push3 gateway that executes automated actions based on metered conditions. Supports three action types: email notifications, webhook HTTP calls, or relay control. Requires TriggerRequest body with trigger name, condition rules, and action configuration. Returns HTTP 201 with the created Trigger object including assigned trigger ID. Trigger becomes active immediately upon creation.
data.reasoning: Original description explains trigger capabilities but omits required input structure, response details, and side effects. Added specifics about TriggerRequest schema, HTTP status code, response content, and activation behavior for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'updateTrigger' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description is too generic and lacks critical details about required parameters (trigger ID), input schema, partial update support, and side effects. Added specifics about parameter requirements, request body structure, partial update capability, and immediate activation to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Updates an existing trigger on a Push3 gateway.
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing trigger on a Push3 gateway by trigger ID. Accepts a TriggerRequest body with updated trigger configuration including name, condition rules, and action settings. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are modified. Returns HTTP 200 with the updated Trigger object. Changes take effect immediately on the gateway.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks critical details about required parameters (trigger ID), input schema, partial update support, and side effects. Added specifics about parameter requirements, request body structure, partial update capability, and immediate activation to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'deleteTrigger' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks details about response format, side effects of deletion, and permanence of the action. Added specifics about HTTP status code, what happens to associated actions, and that deletion is permanent to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.

data.current_description: Deletes a trigger from a Push3 gateway.
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a trigger from a Push3 gateway by trigger ID. Removes the trigger configuration and stops all associated automated actions (email notifications, webhooks, relay control). Returns HTTP 204 No Content on successful deletion. The trigger is immediately removed from the gateway and cannot be recovered.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks details about response format, side effects of deletion, and permanence of the action. Added specifics about HTTP status code, what happens to associated actions, and that deletion is permanent to help AI agents understand the consequences of this operation.
